heading: Other administrative provisions
label: 1010 Other administrative provisions
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior provisions, see note set out under .section 1001 of this title

children.heading: Regulations and administrative arrangements
children.label: a Regulations and administrative arrangements
children.text: The Commissioner of Social Security may prescribe such regulations, and make such administrative and other arrangements, as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Payment of benefits
children.label: b Payment of benefits
children.text: Benefits under this subchapter shall be paid at such time or times and in such installments as the Commissioner of Social Security determines are in the interests of economy and efficiency.

children.heading: Entitlement redeterminations
children.label: c Entitlement redeterminations
children.text: An individual’s entitlement to benefits under this subchapter, and the amount of the benefits, may be redetermined at such time or times as the Commissioner of Social Security determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Suspension and termination of benefits
children.label: d Suspension and termination of benefits
children.text: Regulations prescribed by the Commissioner of Social Security under subsection (a) may provide for the suspension and termination of entitlement to benefits under this subchapter as the Commissioner determines is appropriate.
